# Support

Use the right channel so maintainers and contributors can help quickly.

## Questions

Use [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/im-anishraj/arnio/discussions) for:
- Usage questions.
- Design ideas.
- Help choosing an issue.
- GSSoC onboarding questions.
- "Is this behavior expected?" conversations.

## Bugs

Use [Issues](https://github.com/im-anishraj/arnio/issues) for reproducible bugs. Include:
- Minimal code.
- A tiny CSV sample when relevant.
- Arnio version.
- Python version and operating system.
- Full traceback or incorrect output.

## Security

Do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities. Follow [.github/SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md).
